svg.title: Full-cluster disaster recovery sequence
svg.desc: Git, Omni configuration, 1Password, Kopia, and Barman survive outside the cluster. Talos is rebuilt, Argo bootstraps, application data restores, and health checks prove recovery.

svg.text: Destroy the cluster, keep the recovery contract
